title: Plutarch, Moralia: Why the Pythia Gives Oracles in Verse
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Why the Pythia Gives Oracles in Verse.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Why the Pythia Gives Oracles in Verse.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Why the Pythia Gives Oracles in Verse': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
